pi_items.metadata_value: MASS::epil - Thall and Vail (1990) epilepsy randomized controlled trial
pi_items.verified_value: MASS::epil - Thall and Vail (1990) epilepsy randomized controlled trial

pi_items.source: setup_task.sh script creation and export_result.sh checks
Poisson GLM fitted to dataset yields negative coefficient for treatment, indicating RR < 1
Task description implicitly states the role is biostatistician

pi_items.metadata_value: Uses MASS (base R recommended package) + geepack (CRAN) for GEE analysis of real epilepsy trial data
pi_items.verified_value: Uses MASS (base R recommended package) + geepack (CRAN) for GEE analysis of real epilepsy trial data

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real Thall and Vail (1990) epilepsy trial dataset (MASS::epil) containing exactly 59 patients and 4 two-week periods. The treatment effect (RR) is independently verified to be less than 1 via Poisson GLM modeling. The expected deliverables include a model comparison CSV at /home/ga/RProjects/output/seizure_model_comparison.csv, a diagnostics CSV at /home/ga/RProjects/output/seizure_diagnostics.csv, and an analysis plot at /home/ga/RProjects/output/seizure_analysis.png, utilizing geepack and MASS packages.
